contact.title: Contact Us
about.subtitle: Our Story
about.title: CASFRELA ARTESANAL
about.desc: We provide you with a wide range of products, services, and innovative solutions at incredible prices. Our primary concern is to offer a high level of quality in the products that leave our factory. Needless to say, we are at your disposal to meet your needs, desires, and special orders. We back you up with a team characterized by its cordial treatment and spirit of service.
seasonal.spring_desc: An explosion of freshness with our seasonal fruits. Vibrant flavors that awaken your senses with the sweetest selection from Casfrela.
seasonal.summer_desc: The perfect antidote to the Yucatecan heat. Pure refreshment in every bite, ideal for enjoying under the Mayan sun.
seasonal.autumn_desc: Creamy textures and traditional flavors that comfort the soul. The heritage of Yucatán in our dairy desserts.
why.natural_desc: Only real fruits and dairy products selected directly from source.
why.traditional_desc: We maintain the flavor that has passed from generation to generation.
why.daily_desc: We guarantee maximum freshness in each of our products.
gallery.title: Our Moments
footer.brand_desc: Authentic Yucatecan tradition and natural flavor. Bringing local freshness to your palate.
footer.social_desc: Follow and contact us to place your order or request an event quote.
products.intro_desc: All our fruits are seasonal and fresh, to obtain the pulp with the best possible flavor. The shells are selected through a process to keep only the best and give a high-quality presentation to the product. We search throughout the Mexican Republic for all the fruits we use given that climate change and inclement weather make harvesting situations very variable. The flavors, colors, and sizes of the fruits can change depending on each season, so any of these variations is completely understandable as we depend on what nature provides us.
